channel.title: DJ Elky mixes
channel.itunes:subtitle: Just playing with my DJ gears, from DDJ-T1 to CDJ3000
channel.itunes:author: David Pilato
channel.itunes:summary: If you love funk, house and DJ groove sound, you will like those mixes. Enjoy!
channel.description: If you love funk, house and DJ groove sound, you will like those mixes. Enjoy!

item.title: David's Mix #2011/09/29
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Funk mix
item.description: My first recorded mix with my old Hercules DJ Console
item.itunes:keywords: DJ Elky, Funk, Groove, Club, Mix

item.itunes:subtitle: Funk groove mix
item.description: First recorded mix with my new Pioneer DDJ-T1

item.title: David's Mix #2023/01/23 - Snowcamp Mix
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Snowcamp Mix
item.description: Recorded from home studio, Cergy

item.title: David's Mix #2023/02/21 - Les Envahisseurs - Take 2
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Les Envahisseurs - Take 2
item.description:
Recorded from home studio, Cergy. Initially with Vincent during a night.

Sadly this 4 hands mix was not recorded. So I tried my best to redo a part of it. I must admit that it was much better when we were both playing the set!

First time on my DJM-V10-LF I just received.

item.title: David's Mix #2023/03/09 - Elastic France Private Event
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Elastic France Private Event
item.description:
Recorded from Elastic France office, Paris.

First time for a live event on my DJM-V10-LF. Please bear with me!

item.title: David's Mix #2023/04/15 - Heera's Birthday party
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session recorded at Golf de Saint-Ouen l'Aumône
item.description:
Recorded at Golf de Saint-Ouen l'Aumône.

Second time for a live event on my DJM-V10-LF. For Heera's birthday.

item.title: David's Mix #2023/06/13 - Le Camping des Speakers
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session recorded for le Camping des Speakers
item.description:
Recorded in Baden, Golf du Morbihan at Camping Mané Guernehué.

Was recorded during the Camping des Speakers dinner.

item.itunes:subtitle: Home session recorded for my brother
item.description: Recorded in Cergy, France.
item.itunes:keywords: DJ Elky, Home, Mix, Funk, House

item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session
item.description: Recorded live at Les Bons Amis, Paris 17, France, for Gisèle's birthday.

item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session
item.description: Recorded live in Saint-Georges-Du-Bois, France, for Eric's birthday.
item.itunes:keywords: DJ Elky, Live, Mix, Funk, Disco, House

item.title: David's Mix #2024/05/04 - Mariage Delphine et Laurent - Part 1
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session
item.description: Recorded live at Le Domaine de Brunel, Aincourt, France, for Delphine and Laurent wedding.

item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session
item.description: Recorded live at Le Domaine de Brunel, Aincourt, France, for Delphine and Laurent wedding.

item.title: David's Mix #2024/05/26 - Lisa Forever 2024
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session
item.description: Recorded live at Taverny, France, for Lisa Forever 2024 event.

item.title: David's Mix #2024/07/19 - Riviera Dev Reborn
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live session
item.description: I tried to redo a small part of the live mix I did in Nice, France, for the Riviera Dev event.

item.title: David's Mix #2024/08/08 - Summer Holidays Mix
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Studio session
item.description:
Recorded in Cergy, France, for the summer holidays so I have some music to listen while driving.

Tribal, deep house, house and funky vibes.

item.title: David's Mix #2024/11/07 - DevFest Toulouse 2024
item.itunes:author: David Pilato and Julien Briault
item.itunes:subtitle: Live from Labege Diagora, FR
item.description:
Live from Labege Diagora, France, for the DevFest Toulouse 2024.

4 hands on decks by David Pilato and Julien Briault. Using 4 CDJ3000 and 1 DJM-V10-LF.

item.title: David's Mix #2024/12/05 - Elastic DecemberFest 2024
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Live from Elastic Office Paris, FR
item.description:
Live from Elastic Office, Paris, France, for the DecemberFest private party.

Using 2 CDJ3000 and 1 DJM-V10-LF.

item.title: David's Mix #2025/02/06 - Touraine Tech 2025
item.itunes:author: David Pilato and Julien Briault
item.itunes:subtitle: Live from Hotel Gouin in Tours, FR
item.description:
Live set for Touraine Tech 2025, recorded at Hotel Gouin in Tours, FR.

Using 2 CDJ3000 and 1 DJM-V10-LF by David Pilato and Julien Briault.

item.title: David's Mix #2025/05/06 - EAH 2025
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Recorded from my studio in Cergy, FR
item.description: Using 2 CDJ3000 and 1 DJM-V10-LF.

item.title: David's Mix #2025/06/05 - DevQuest Niort 2025
item.itunes:author: David Pilato
item.itunes:subtitle: Recorded live from Niort, FR
item.description:
Using 2 CDJ3000 and 1 DJM-V10-LF.

Sadly the recording failed so you can just listen to one part of it.
